name: Skip
description_en: Skip is the self-proclaimed King of the Reef. He is arrogant, cocky and mischievous. Skip encountered 2 Conchologist and stole a specimen from him.
description_fr: Skip est le roi autoproclamé du récif. Il est arrogant, arrogant et espiègle. Skip a rencontré 2 conchologues et lui a volé un spécimen.
